Title: Create RFQ from Cart
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Logged in as B2B org buyer ({{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}); cart contains 2+ items from enabled catalog; RFQ feature enabled for the org
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to cart page; [ASSERT] verify 2+ line items present; [COND: RFQ feature enabled] [ACT] click 'Add cart items to quote' button (cart-side entry to the Quote request panel); [WAIT] wait for RFQ modal or page to load; [ASSERT] verify RFQ form pre-populates with cart line items and quantities; [ACT] fill specifications/notes field with free-text comment; [ACT] click 'Submit' on RFQ form; [WAIT] wait for confirmation response; [ASSERT] verify confirmation message shown; [NAV] navigate to /account/quotes; [ASSERT] verify new quote appears with status 'Processing'; [NAV] return to cart; [ASSERT] verify cart items still present after RFQ submission
Assertions: [COND: RFQ feature enabled] 'Add cart items to quote' button visible on cart for B2B org user (or 'Request Quote' on /account/quotes page header); [DOM] RFQ form displays each cart line item with name and quantity; [STATE] quote status = 'Processing' in /account/quotes list; [DOM] confirmation message contains 'submitted' or 'request received'; [STATE] cart item count unchanged after RFQ submission
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] POST createQuoteFromCart mutation — response errors[] is empty; [CONSOLE] no JS errors on RFQ form submission; [NETWORK] 2xx response on quote creation endpoint
Failure_Signals: 'Add cart items to quote' button absent for org buyer; RFQ form fails to pre-populate cart items; quote does not appear in /account/quotes after submission
Cleanup: reject quote via admin if accepted/pending

Title: View Quote in Account
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
RFQ submitted and confirmed with status 'Processing'; logged in as same B2B org buyer who submitted the RFQ
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to account menu; [ACT] click 'Quotes' or navigate to /account/quotes; [WAIT] wait for quotes list to load; [ASSERT] verify submitted quote appears in list; [ASSERT] verify Quote ID displayed; [ASSERT] verify submission date shown; [ASSERT] verify status badge shows 'Processing'; [ASSERT] verify item count matches original cart
Assertions: [DOM] /account/quotes page loads without error; [DOM] quote row shows Quote ID; [DOM] submission date formatted correctly; [STATE] status badge text = 'Processing'; [DOM] item count on row matches number of cart items submitted
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] GET quotes query returns the quote record; [CONSOLE] no 404 or auth errors on quotes list page
Failure_Signals: quotes list page returns 404 or access denied; submitted quote not visible in list; status shows value other than 'Processing'

Title: Quote Detail Page
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
Quote exists in 'Processing' status in buyer's account; logged in as the B2B org buyer who created the quote
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on the quote to open detail page; [WAIT] wait for detail page to load; [ASSERT] verify page title or header shows Quote ID; [ASSERT] verify each line item displays product name and requested quantity; [ASSERT] verify specifications/notes entered during RFQ submission are visible; [ASSERT] verify current status is displayed prominently; [ASSERT] verify submission date shown
Assertions: [DOM] quote detail page loads without error; [DOM] all line items from original RFQ shown with product name and qty; [DOM] specs/notes text matches text entered at submission; [STATE] status indicator shows 'Processing'; [FORMAT] Quote ID and submission date formatted consistently
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] GET quote detail query returns full line items; [CONSOLE] no JS errors on detail page load
Failure_Signals: detail page returns 404; line items missing or count incorrect; specs/notes field empty when text was entered; status indicator absent

Title: Admin Response Notification
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
{{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} env var set (quote in 'Quote Received' status — admin has responded with pricing); buyer logged in as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}
Steps: [NAV] Log in as B2B org buyer ({{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}); [ASSERT] check storefront header notification area for new alert badge; [ACT] click notification or navigate to /account/quotes; [WAIT] wait for quotes list to refresh; [ASSERT] verify quote {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} shows updated status ('Quote Received' or equivalent); [ASSERT] verify notification or badge indicates admin has responded
Assertions: [DOM] notification badge or alert visible in header indicating quote update; [STATE] quote status shows 'Quote Received' or equivalent (not 'Processing'); [DOM] updated status reflected in quotes list without manual refresh
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] GET notifications or quote status query shows updated state; [CONSOLE] no errors loading notification data
Failure_Signals: no notification badge shown after admin response; quote still shows 'Processing' status; no visual indicator of state change

Title: View Updated Quote Pricing
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
{{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} env var set (quote with admin-proposed pricing per line item); buyer logged in as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on quote {{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}}; [WAIT] wait for detail page to load; [ASSERT] verify Admin's proposed unit price shown per line item; [ASSERT] verify original requested/catalog price shown alongside for comparison; [ASSERT] verify total proposed quote value shown; [ASSERT] verify validity/expiry date displayed if set by Admin
Assertions: [DOM] each line item shows Admin-proposed unit price; [DOM] comparison price (original) visible per line; [MATH] total quote value = sum of (proposed unit price × quantity) for all lines; [FORMAT] expiry date formatted as readable date; [STATE] status shows 'Quote Received'
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] GET quote detail returns admin_price fields per line item; [CONSOLE] no rendering errors on quote detail with pricing

Title: Accept Quote

{{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} env var set (quote in 'Quote Received' status with admin pricing); buyer logged in as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}

Assertions: [DOM] 'Accept Quote' button present when quote has Admin pricing; [DOM] confirmation dialog displayed before committing; [STATE] status = 'Accepted' after confirmation; [DOM] 'Convert to Order' button visible after acceptance; [DOM] 'Reject Quote' button absent after acceptance; [STATE] acceptance timestamp recorded on detail page

Title: Convert Quote to Order
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
{{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} env var set (quote in 'Accepted' status with admin-proposed pricing); buyer logged in as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}; shipping address and payment method configured
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on quote {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}}; [WAIT] wait for detail page; [KEY] note quoted unit prices for each line item; [ACT] click 'Convert to Order'; [WAIT] wait for checkout flow to load; [ASSERT] verify checkout pre-populated with quote line items and quantities; [ASSERT] verify prices displayed are Admin-quoted prices not current catalog prices; [ACT] select shipping address; [ACT] select shipping method; [ACT] confirm payment method; [ACT] click 'Place Order'; [WAIT] wait for order confirmation page; [ASSERT] verify order confirmation shows quoted prices; [NAV] navigate to /account/quotes; [ASSERT] verify quote status is 'Ordered' or 'Closed'
Assertions: [DOM] checkout pre-populated with all accepted quote line items; [MATH] checkout line prices = Admin-quoted prices not catalog prices; [STATE] quote status = 'Ordered' or 'Closed' after conversion; [DOM] order confirmation references original Quote ID; [NAV] redirect to order confirmation page after place order
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] POST createOrderFromCart mutation — response errors[] is empty; [API] verify order total in response matches sum of (quoted unit price × qty) for all lines; [CONSOLE] no errors during checkout from quote; [NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on order placement endpoint
Failure_Signals: checkout opens with catalog prices instead of quoted prices; 'Convert to Order' fails or redirects to error page; order confirmation total does not match quoted total; quote status remains 'Accepted' after order placement
Cleanup: none — order placed is final; verify quote status updated to Ordered/Closed

Title: Reject Quote

Title: RFQ Form - Buyer Modifies Item Quantities Before Submission
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Buyer logged in as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}; cart contains at least 2 items with initial quantities set (e.g. Item A qty 2, Item B qty 3); RFQ feature enabled for the org
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to cart page; [KEY] note Item A qty = 2 and Item B qty = 3; [ACT] click 'Add cart items to quote' button (cart-side entry to the Quote request panel); [WAIT] wait for RFQ form to load; [ASSERT] verify RFQ form pre-populates Item A qty = 2 and Item B qty = 3; [ACT] change Item A quantity on the RFQ form to 5; [ASSERT] verify quantity field accepts the new value 5; [ASSERT] verify Item B quantity remains unchanged at 3; [ACT] fill specifications/notes field; [ACT] click 'Submit' on RFQ form; [WAIT] wait for confirmation; [NAV] navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on the newly created quote to open detail; [ASSERT] verify quote detail shows Item A qty = 5; [ASSERT] verify quote detail shows Item B qty = 3; [ASSERT] verify cart still shows original quantities (Item A qty 2, Item B qty 3) unchanged
Assertions: [DOM] RFQ form shows editable quantity fields per line item; [DOM] quantity field accepts the modified value 5 for Item A; [STATE] RFQ form quantity for Item B unchanged at 3 after editing Item A; [STATE] submitted quote shows Item A qty = 5 (modified value) not 2 (cart value); [STATE] submitted quote shows Item B qty = 3 (original value); [STATE] cart quantities unaffected by RFQ quantity edits (cart Item A remains 2)
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] createQuoteFromCart mutation payload includes modified qty 5 for Item A; [API] quote detail response shows qty=5 for Item A; [CONSOLE] no errors on RFQ form quantity edit; [NETWORK] 2xx on quote submission
Failure_Signals: RFQ form quantity fields read-only (cannot be edited); edited quantity reverts to cart quantity on submission; quote detail shows cart quantity (2) not RFQ quantity (5) for Item A; cart quantity altered when RFQ quantity changed
Cleanup: reject quote via admin if accepted/pending

[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
{{EXPIRED_QUOTE}} env var set (quote with past expiry date); buyer logged in as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on quote {{EXPIRED_QUOTE}}; [WAIT] wait for detail page; [ASSERT] verify status badge shows 'Expired'; [ASSERT] verify 'Accept Quote' button is absent or disabled; [ASSERT] verify 'Convert to Order' button is absent or disabled; [ACT] attempt to invoke accept action via any available UI; [ASSERT] verify acceptance blocked with clear error message; [ASSERT] verify option to create new RFQ for same items available
Assertions: [DOM] 'Expired' status badge displayed prominently; [DOM] 'Accept Quote' absent or visually disabled; [DOM] 'Convert to Order' absent or disabled; [STATE] no acceptance pathway available for expired quote; [DOM] error message or tooltip explains expiry; [DOM] new RFQ option available
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] accept mutation on expired quote returns error; [CONSOLE] no errors on expired quote detail page; [NETWORK] no 2xx response on expired quote acceptance attempt
Failure_Signals: 'Accept Quote' active on expired quote; acceptance succeeds for expired quote creating invalid order; no expiry indication; 'Convert to Order' available on expired quote

Title: Quote Status - Expiry Date and Status Badge Display
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
At least 3 quotes owned by {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}: one with future expiry, {{EXPIRED_QUOTE}} (past expiry), one without expiry date; buyer logged in
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ASSERT] verify each quote in list shows status badge (color-coded or labeled); [ACT] click on quote with future expiry date; [ASSERT] verify expiry date displayed on detail page; [ASSERT] verify status badge is not 'Expired'; [NAV] go back to quotes list; [ACT] click on quote {{EXPIRED_QUOTE}}; [ASSERT] verify 'Expired' badge prominently displayed; [ASSERT] verify expiry date shown and is in the past; [NAV] go back; [ACT] click on quote without expiry; [ASSERT] verify no expiry date shown or 'No expiry' indicated
Assertions: [DOM] status badges visible per quote in list view; [DOM] active quote shows future expiry date; [STATE] expired quote shows 'Expired' badge with past date; [DOM] quote without expiry either omits date field or shows 'No expiry'; [FORMAT] expiry dates formatted consistently; [DOM] badge colors or styles differentiate statuses
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] quotes list returns expiryDate and status per quote; [CONSOLE] no errors rendering status badges; [NETWORK] 2xx on quotes list load
Failure_Signals: status badges missing from list; expiry dates absent from detail pages; active quote incorrectly shows 'Expired'; expired quote shows active status

Title: Quote Status - Status Transitions Visible in History
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
{{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} or {{QUOTE_REJECTED}} env var set (quote that has transitioned through at least 2 statuses: Processing → Quote Received → Accepted or Rejected); buyer logged in as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on quote {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} (or substitute {{QUOTE_REJECTED}}); [WAIT] wait for detail page; [SCROLL] scroll to history or timeline section; [COND: status history feature present] [ASSERT] verify status transition history visible; [ASSERT] verify each transition shows previous status and new status and date; [ASSERT] verify transitions in chronological order; [ASSERT] verify current status is the latest entry in history
Assertions: [COND: status history feature present] status history or timeline section present on quote detail; [DOM] each entry shows status change with timestamp; [STATE] entries in chronological order; [STATE] latest entry matches current quote status; [FORMAT] timestamps formatted consistently
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] quote detail includes statusHistory or changeLog; [CONSOLE] no errors rendering history; [NETWORK] 2xx on quote detail
Failure_Signals: status history absent from quote detail; only current status shown; timestamps missing; entries in wrong order; current status inconsistent with latest history entry

Title: Quote Status - Notification on Status Change
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
{{QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE}} env var set (admin just responded to quote); buyer logged in as {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}}; storefront notification system enabled
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to storefront home page; [COND: notification system enabled] [ASSERT] verify notification badge or indicator in header shows unread notification; [ACT] click notification area; [ASSERT] verify notification about quote status change visible; [ASSERT] verify notification includes Quote ID and new status; [ACT] click notification to navigate to quote; [ASSERT] verify navigation to correct quote detail page; [ASSERT] verify quote shows updated status matching notification
Assertions: [COND: notification system enabled] notification badge visible in header; [DOM] notification text references quote ID and status change; [NAV] clicking notification navigates to correct quote detail; [STATE] quote status on detail matches notification; [DOM] notification marked as read after viewing
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] notifications endpoint returns quote status change notification; [CONSOLE] no errors on notification interaction; [NETWORK] 2xx on notification and quote detail requests
Failure_Signals: no notification shown after admin status change; notification missing quote ID; clicking notification leads to wrong page; notification badge does not clear after viewing

Title: Quote to Order - Convert When Item Out of Stock
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on quote {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE_OOS}}; [ACT] click 'Convert to Order'; [WAIT] wait for checkout to load or error; [ASSERT] verify error message identifies out-of-stock item by name; [ASSERT] verify conversion blocked or user warned before proceeding; [ASSERT] verify available items still eligible for ordering; [ASSERT] verify no partial order created silently without user consent
Assertions: [DOM] error message identifies out-of-stock item by name; [STATE] conversion blocked or warning shown before proceeding; [DOM] available items still visible and orderable; [STATE] no silent partial order created; [DOM] user has clear options: remove item or wait or cancel conversion
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] conversion attempt returns error with out-of-stock item details; [CONSOLE] no unhandled exceptions on conversion attempt; [NETWORK] no order created silently (verify via orders API)
Failure_Signals: conversion succeeds silently dropping out-of-stock item; no error for out-of-stock; partial order created without user consent; all items blocked due to one out-of-stock item

Title: Quote to Order - Convert After Admin Price Change
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on quote {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}}; [KEY] note quoted unit prices per line item from quote detail; [ACT] click 'Convert to Order'; [WAIT] wait for checkout; [ASSERT] verify checkout uses quoted prices (not current catalog prices); [ASSERT] verify line totals match quote agreement not live prices; [ASSERT] verify order total based on quoted prices; [ACT] complete checkout; [ASSERT] verify order confirmation shows quoted prices
Assertions: [STATE] checkout prices = quoted agreed prices not current catalog prices; [MATH] line totals = quoted unit price x quantity; [MATH] order total reflects quoted prices; [DOM] prices on checkout match quote detail prices; [STATE] order placed at quoted prices regardless of catalog changes
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] createOrderFromQuote preserves quoted prices in order; [CONSOLE] no pricing errors in console; [NETWORK] 2xx on order creation from quote
Failure_Signals: checkout shows current catalog prices instead of quoted; order total differs from quote agreement; quoted prices lost during conversion; user charged different amount than agreed

Title: Quote to Order - Partial Conversion Not Supported
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on quote {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE}} with 3+ items; [ACT] click 'Convert to Order'; [WAIT] wait for checkout; [ASSERT] verify all quote items present in checkout (no option to deselect individual items); [ASSERT] verify quantities match accepted quote quantities; [ASSERT] verify no item-level removal option during conversion; [ASSERT] verify checkout line item count matches quote line item count
Assertions: [STATE] all quote items present in checkout — no partial selection; [MATH] quantities match accepted quote exactly; [DOM] no per-item remove or deselect option during quote conversion checkout; [STATE] line item count in checkout = line item count in quote; [DOM] user must convert entire quote as a whole
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] conversion creates order with all quote line items; [CONSOLE] no errors during full conversion; [NETWORK] 2xx on conversion endpoint
Failure_Signals: user can deselect items during conversion (partial conversion unintended); item count differs between quote and checkout; quantities changed during conversion

Title: Quote to Order - PO Number Preserved from RFQ
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to /account/quotes; [ACT] click on quote {{ACCEPTED_QUOTE_WITH_PO}}; [KEY] note the PO number displayed on quote detail; [ACT] click 'Convert to Order'; [WAIT] wait for checkout; [ASSERT] verify PO number field pre-populated with quote PO number in checkout; [ACT] complete checkout; [WAIT] wait for confirmation; [ASSERT] verify order confirmation shows PO number; [NAV] navigate to /account/orders; [ACT] click on the new order; [ASSERT] verify PO number on order detail matches original quote PO number
Assertions: [DOM] PO number pre-populated in checkout from quote; [STATE] PO number on order = PO number from quote; [DOM] PO number visible on order confirmation page; [DOM] PO number visible on order detail in /account/orders; [STATE] PO number not lost during quote-to-order conversion
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] order created from quote includes poNumber field matching quote; [CONSOLE] no errors during conversion; [NETWORK] 2xx on order creation
Failure_Signals: PO number absent from checkout during conversion; PO number not carried to order; order detail missing PO number; PO number changed or cleared during conversion

Assertions: [STATE] quote status = 'Ordered' or 'Closed' after conversion; [DOM] 'Convert to Order' button absent on converted quote; [DOM] 'Accept Quote' button absent on converted quote; [DOM] order reference number visible on quote detail; [STATE] quote is terminal — no further actions available
